title: Rajah & Tann Singapore reorganises Disputes practice with new Practice Heads and focus areas
description: Rajah & Tann Singapore has made a significant reorganisation of its Disputes practice as clients increasingly seek specialised expertise for high stakes, complex litigation.Deputy Managing Partner Kelvin Poon, SC, will assume the role of Regional Head of Dispute Resolution, setting the strategic direction for the practice across the region and guiding its growth. Avinash Pradhan will take over the role of Head of International Arbitration, reinforcing the firm’s strength in cross-border disp
